notes: Coverage expansion pass: five new sets added for the roster-eligible species that previously had zero draft sets (Suicune, Pelipper, Hydreigon, Indeedee-F, Giratina-Origin). All fourteen sets are reviewed for staging validation.

Five previously-blocked sets were re-curated in the same pass: sourceType reclassified from generated to curated for four of them (aggronmega-body-press-defensive-attacker-draft, incineroar-fast-taunt-pivot-draft, togekiss-bulky-redirection-support-draft, mukalola-special-wall-draft), and the flagged technical concerns were resolved and documented in each record's humanReview (see sets.json). This does NOT self-certify verified-evidence.fixture.json's stagingReview/limitationsResolved fields, which still require independent review — see verified-readiness-transition-report.md.
No set is verified or active. Package remains blocked for production.
Staging publish is allowed only to pokemonsets_v2_staging with EQUINOX_DATA_MODE=mongo and EQUINOX_ALLOW_DATABASE_WRITES=true.
